recent_projects.name: sitetracker-github-mcp
recent_projects.summary: MCP server for GitHub with 64 tools - natural language queries, PRs, issues, file operations, branches, forks, releases, workflows, teams, and more

recent_projects.name: fairyfly-therm
recent_projects.summary: Fairyfly extension for translating HBJSON files to INP files for eQuest
recent_projects.author: Ladybug Tools

recent_projects.name: brybox
recent_projects.summary: Brybox is a personal automation toolkit for PC organization. It streamlines repetitive tasks such as PDF sorting, photo and video organization, and email/download handling. Designed to replace tedious manual workflows, Brybox provides a flexible, extensible framework for managing digital clutter with ease.

recent_projects.name: atlantic
recent_projects.summary: Atlantic is an automated preprocessing framework for supervised machine learning
recent_projects.author: Luís Fernando da Silva Santos

recent_projects.name: swarmkit
recent_projects.summary: Pythonic wrapper around the TypeScript SwarmKit SDK for multi-agent orchestration in E2B sandboxes
recent_projects.license: Proprietary Beta Evaluation License - See LICENSE file

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: brybox
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: Brybox is a personal automation toolkit for PC organization. It streamlines repetitive tasks such as PDF sorting, photo and video organization, and email/download handling. Designed to replace tedious manual workflows, Brybox provides a flexible, extensible framework for managing digital clutter with ease.
